description: The image presents a striking contrast between two colors: black and white. The entire image is filled with a deep black color, serving as the background. Dominating this monochromatic canvas is a single object in stark white: a text box positioned centrally within the image. The simplicity of the design draws attention to its message: "Hello, World". This greeting, written in a clear, bold font, stands out against the black background, making it the focal point of the image. The precise location of the text box is right at the center of the image, further emphasizing its importance. There are no other objects or texts present in the image, and no actions taking place. The image is a study in minimalism, with just two colors and one object to explore.
